settings.name: endpoint
settings.label: PriceAPI endpoint
settings.description: Optional custom endpoint for PriceAPI-compatible providers.

settings.name: country
settings.label: Country code
settings.description: Country code used for provider lookups (for example nl, de, fr).

secrets.name: apiKey
secrets.label: PriceAPI API key
secrets.description: API key used for PriceAPI price checks.
